allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add modern web UI with tabbed interface and real-time updates

Implemented a complete UI overhaul for the Photo Backup Station web interface:

- Created modern, responsive web UI with 4 tabbed sections (Status, History, WiFi, Configuration)
- Added real-time WebSocket updates with automatic reconnection
- Implemented visual progress bars with live sync statistics
- Added WiFi management with network scanning and signal strength indicators
- Created configuration interface for rclone setup and settings management
- Designed clean, card-based layout with professional styling
- Added mobile-responsive design with optimized layouts for all screen sizes
- Included loading states, animations, and comprehensive error handling

The new UI provides a much more professional and user-friendly experience for monitoring photo backups and managing the device.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
